km.Suffolk, England: ស៊ូfប៉ូលក, ប្រទេសអង់គ្លេស, uណៃteត គីnហ្គដុម

zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard De Halstad於1160年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可時，他的父親Richard De Halstad27歲，母親Mrs. Richard De Halstad28歲。他和Mrs. Richard De Halstad至少有1個兒子。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard De Halstad于1160年出生在英国英格兰素福爾可时，他的父亲Richard De Halstad27岁，母亲Mrs. Richard De Halstad28岁。他和Mrs. Richard De Halstad至少有1个儿子。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Halstad
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Sophus, Tor.

Norwegian: habitational name from any of several farmsteads named Holstad, from Hol- (probably derived from a personal name such as Old Norse Hávarthr, Ólafr) + -stad from stathir ‘farmstead, dwelling’.

variants.name: Holsted
meanings: Norwegian: variant of Holstad . The surname Holsted is rare in Norway.
Probably also English: variant of   Halstead  .

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Richard De Halstad was born in 1160, in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, Richard De Halstad, was 27 and his mother, Mrs. Richard De Halstad, was 28. He had at least 1 son with Mrs. Richard De Halstad.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard De Halstad est né en 1160, à Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Richard De Halstad, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Richard De Halstad, avait 28 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Mrs. Richard De Halstad.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard De Halstad 1160 in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard De Halstad 27 und seine Mutter Mrs. Richard De Halstad 28. Er hatte mit Mrs. Richard De Halstad mindestens 1 Sohn.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard De Halstad è nato il nel 1160 nel Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Richard De Halstad, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Mrs. Richard De Halstad, aveva 28 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Mrs. Richard De Halstad.

ja.Suffolk, England: イギリスイギリススフォルク
ja.lifeSummary: Richard De Halstadが1160年にイギリスイギリススフォルクで生まれた時，父Richard De Halstadは27歳，母Mrs. Richard De Halstadは28歳であった。彼はMrs. Richard De Halstadとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard De Halstad(이)가 1160년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard De Halstad(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. Richard De Halstad(은)는 28세였다. 그는 Mrs. Richard De Halstad(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard De Halstad nasceu em 1160, em Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Richard De Halstad, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Richard De Halstad, tinha 28 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Mrs. Richard De Halstad.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard De Halstad родился в 1160 г. в местности суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Richard De Halstad было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Richard De Halstad, 28. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Mrs. Richard De Halstad.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard De Halstad nació en 1160, en Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Richard De Halstad, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Mrs. Richard De Halstad, tenía 28 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Mrs. Richard De Halstad.
